docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING COMPLEX DESIGNATION FOR FAILURE TO FILE APPLICATION REQUESTING DESIGNATION. (MJ)

EXHIBIT A TO APPLICATION OF APPROVAL OF COMPLEX CASE DESIGNATION (FILED AUGUST 21, 2019) (TRANSACTION ID # 64165415) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PYRON, NATHANIEL INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED

COMPLEX LITIGATION, DEPT. 613, OCT-22-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR AS TO CALENDARING IN THIS SPECIFIC CONSOLIDATED ACTION. CASE HAS BEEN CONSOLIDATED UNDER LEAD CASE NO. CGC-19-575293 (HINSON V. LYFT) AND ALL FUTURE CALENDARING TO BE DONE UNDER THE LEAD CASE NO. ONLY. (613/TLJ)

NOT REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION APPLICATION IS GRANTED. AN ORDER GRANTING COMPLEX DESIGNATION AND ASSIGNMENT TO JUDGE TERI L JACKSON, IN DEPT. 613, FOR ALL PURPOSES IS ISSUED. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR OCT-22-2019, AT 1:30 PM, IN DEPT. 613. THE NOV-06-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-19-575294, CGC-19-575453, CGC-19-575475, CGC-19-575644, CGC-19-575728, CGC-19-576502, CGC-19-579089 WITH CASE CGC-19-575293 / JOINT STIPULATION AND ORDER CONSOLIDATING RELATED CASES; ALL FURTHER ENTRIES UNDER CASE CGC-19-575293
